name: Sinful French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the eggs, heavy cream, vanilla extract, and triple sec until well blended.
2. Melt butter on a griddle or pan over medium-high heat.
3. Dip each slice (thick or thin) of bread into the egg mixture, coating both sides completely.
4. Place the coated slices onto the griddle or pan.
5. Sprinkle cinnamon over the tops and fry each side until golden brown.
6. Serve with butter and syrup, preserves, fresh fruit, fruit compote, or a cinnamon/sugar mix. This can also be made with white bread, but the egg bread makes it even better.
7. Enjoy!
